title: Feature Tier Current Memory Metadata
goal: Complete the remaining #450 parent-lane gap by removing current-memory from ordinary module/feature-tier metadata while preserving optional legacy migration and routing-calibration handling.
non_goals: Do not delete legacy migration support.
Do not remove optional routing-feedback calibration behavior.
Do not reopen the completed #455 package payload removal work.

intent.outcome: agentic-workspace modules/start/report should no longer advertise .agentic-workspace/memory/repo/current as an ordinary Memory install or workflow surface.
intent.constraints: Keep current-memory only as migration/calibration residue where explicitly selected.
intent.latitude: Patch contract metadata and any generated routing text needed to make ordinary feature-tier output honest.
intent.escalation: Escalate if removing ordinary metadata would require deleting migration or calibration support.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice, commit it, then close #450 if issue-state refresh still shows no remaining child gaps.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, contract tooling checks, modules/start/report outputs, planning checks

invariants: Current-memory is not a normal shared current-state feature.
Memory still provides durable anti-rediscovery knowledge.
Legacy migration/calibration support remains explicit and opt-in.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450 make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.activation trigger: close #450 after this milestone is committed and external evidence is refreshed

active_milestone.scope: Remove stale current-memory ordinary metadata from feature-tier/module output.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make #450 feature-tier output honest by removing current-memory from ordinary Memory module metadata.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not reintroduce current-memory as active shared state or remove legacy migration/calibration support.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact metadata wording, tests, and whether a small runtime renderer patch is needed.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The remaining gap requires changing feature-tier product direction or deleting compatibility behavior.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Remove stale ordinary surface metadata instead of adding another explanatory surface.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can #450 now close with current-memory absent from ordinary startup/module metadata and advanced features opt-in?

immediate_next_action: Patch ordinary module metadata so current-memory no longer appears as an install/workflow surface.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/feature-tier-current-memory-metadata.plan.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/module_registry.json src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
completion_criteria: modules output does not list .agentic-workspace/memory/repo/current as an ordinary memory install or workflow surface.
startup/report still expose feature tiers and advanced opt-in policy.
Tests protect current-memory from reappearing in ordinary feature-tier metadata.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Removed .agentic-workspace/memory/repo/current from ordinary Memory module install/workflow metadata and memory bridge routing while preserving explicit legacy migration/calibration handling.

execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #449 remains the broader operating-cost parent; command-generation extraction and operational-footprint lanes remain lower priority.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive carries #450 acceptance evidence; no new durable docs or memory note needed.
execution_summary.resume from: close #450, refresh external evidence, then promote the next open roadmap issue

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; legacy migration/calibration references remain explicit and opt-in rather than ordinary module metadata.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: close #450, keep #449 and lower-priority extraction/footprint parents open

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The only newly discovered #450 gap was stale current-memory ordinary metadata; this slice removed it and current compact outputs satisfy the parent acceptance criteria.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: archive plan, module registry contract, tests/test_workspace_cli.py regression, modules/start/report outputs
closure_check.reopen trigger: ordinary startup/modules output again asks a new repo to understand advanced or current-memory surfaces without observed need

cost_assessment.workflow_cost_found: Parent-lane closeout required validating the compact outputs rather than trusting closed child issues.
cost_assessment.architecture_cost_found: The module registry remained a stale authority surface after current-memory payload removal.
cost_assessment.needless_complexity_found: Current-memory was still listed as an ordinary Memory install/workflow surface despite being migration/calibration residue.
cost_assessment.surfaces_added: No new first-contact surface; one checked-in execplan is temporary closeout evidence.
cost_assessment.surfaces_removed_merged_or_demoted: .agentic-workspace/memory/repo/current was removed from ordinary Memory module metadata and memory bridge routing.
cost_assessment.artifact_footprint_changed: One execplan archive is added; shipped ordinary metadata is smaller.
cost_assessment.shipped_default_footprint_changed: Smaller: ordinary modules output no longer advertises current-memory.
cost_assessment.signals_consumed: Dogfooding validation of #450 acceptance found stale current-memory metadata in modules output.
cost_assessment.signals_still_accumulating: Large CLI/test/artifact surfaces remain routed to command-generation extraction and operational-footprint lanes.
cost_assessment.human_steering_avoided_next_time: The regression test prevents current-memory from silently reappearing as an ordinary module surface.
